title: The Demon's Symmetry
prompt: The final demon holds the ring. Complete the proof to end the descent.
lore: The demon shudders, and for an instant its shape flickers into something you almost know — then the fire takes it.
help: This room holds 5 lemmas — finish them all (turn every wip into qed). (1) Helper. by and_intro(B, A) cases; and_right/and_left each then ⊢ A ∧ B; by both. (2) Helper. or_elim(A, B, B ∨ A) cases; build with or_intro_right / or_intro_left. (3) Uses and_comm. implication_intro then P := A ∧ B ⊢ B ∧ A; by and_comm(A, B, P);. (4) Uses or_comm. implication_intro then P := A ∨ B ⊢ B ∨ A; by or_comm(A, B, P);. (5) The finale. and_intro cases; by and_comm_imp(A, B); and by or_comm_imp(A, B);.
